title: Implement Concrete Scenario Types and NPC Personalities
description: Build out the simulation content: concrete Scenario subclasses and NPC personality types. The base classes are in place.

npcs: src/simulation/npcs/boss_npc.py — Manager who tracks deadlines and performance
src/simulation/npcs/coworker_npc.py — Peer with varying patience levels
src/simulation/npcs/friend_npc.py — Personal relationship with understanding/frustration dynamics
src/simulation/npcs/supportive_npc.py — Always-supportive character for early training
